overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage depicting a smooth boat journey through a snowy mountain canyon river. The camera glides at water level between steep rocky cliffs topped with snow and sparse vegetation, transitioning from shaded canyon sections to areas with direct bright sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain canyon river with steep rock walls

agents.ego_description: piloting watercraft steadily through the canyon river between high cliff walls

entered.detail: steep dark rock face with snow patches on top, forming the left canyon wall
tall rocky cliff with layered sedimentary texture and snow caps
dark reflective water surface with ripples and foam trails
distant mountain peaks covered in white snow visible above cliff tops
hazy opening between the canyon walls showing the river continuing ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth boat journey through a narrow mountain canyon. Steep rocky cliffs rise on both sides, their tops dusted with snow, while the watercraft glides over dark reflective water. The lighting is diffused as the sun remains hidden behind the right cliff wall, creating a cool, shadowed atmosphere in the enclosed river corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit canyon river with bright glare on water

events.description: sun disk becomes visible above the right cliff wall, creating bright glare and sparkles on the water surface

agents.ego_description: continuing through the canyon as sunlight illuminates the scene

entered.detail: bright white sun appearing in the sky between the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: As the boat progresses, the sun emerges from behind the right cliff, transforming the lighting from diffused to direct and bright. The water surface catches the light creating sparkling reflections, while the canyon walls remain prominent on both sides. The sun climbs higher in the sky as the journey continues through the winding waterway.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening canyon river approaching forested valley

events.description: canyon opens to reveal distant forested shoreline on the left as the left cliff recedes

agents.ego_description: cruising toward the open valley with forested shores becoming visible

entered.detail: dense evergreen trees covering the distant shoreline visible as the canyon widens

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually widens, revealing a distant forested shoreline on the left as the rocky cliff wall recedes into the background. The bright midday sun remains high overhead, illuminating the open water ahead. The right cliff continues alongside while the left side opens up to show a tree-covered valley, suggesting the boat is approaching a wider section of the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous boat journey through a narrow mountain canyon that gradually opens into a wide, sun-drenched river valley. It begins in a cool, shadowed corridor where steep rocky cliffs dusted with snow tower over dark reflective water. As the boat progresses, the sun emerges from behind the right cliff wall, transforming the diffused lighting into a bright glare that creates sparkling reflections across the water's surface. The scene then expands as the canyon widens, causing the left cliff to recede and reveal a distant, tree-covered shoreline. Finally, the camera glides toward an open stretch of river under a high midday sun, with the rocky walls giving way to a forested valley.
